title: jasminum sambac
intro: Jasminum sambac, also known as the Arabian jasmine or night-blooming jasmine, is a fragrant, evergreen vine native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its flowers and leaves exhibiting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jasminum sambac include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality, due to its calming effects. In herbal preparations, the flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
